1.name: Prowess
1.description: The Kindred's unarmed or clubbing attacks deal lethal damage instead of bashing if they so choose.
references: Laws of the Night Revised Edition Pg. 166

2.name: Might
2.description: The Kindred can make a free retest on any challenge involving strength.
references: Laws of the Night Revised Edition Pg. 166

3.name: Vigor
3.description: The Kindred may use the bomb (beats rock and paper, loses to scissors) on any challenge involving strength.
references: Laws of the Night Revised Edition Pg. 166

4.name: Intensity
4.description: The Kindred may bid the Potence and not risk losing any physical traits in challenges of strength.
references: Laws of the Night Revised Edition Pg. 166

5.name: Puissance
5.description: The Kindred wins on ties involving all strength based tests and deal an additional level of damage in which their strength is a factor.
references: Laws of the Night Revised Edition Pg. 167

6.name: Imprint
6.description: The Kindred squeezes so hard they leave imprints in solid steel.
references: Guide to the Camarilla Pg. 93
Laws of the Night: Camarilla Guide Pg. 59
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 192

6.name: Master of the Forge
6.description: The Kindred creates exceptional metalwork tools and weapons.
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 159

6.name: Relentless Pursuit
6.description: The Kindred makes extraordinary leaps through the air.
references: Clanbook: Brujah Revised Pg. 68
Lore of the Clans Pg. 49

6.name: The Fist of Caine
6.description: The Kindred makes brawling attacks from a few yards away.
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 88

6.name: The Gentle Rebuke
6.description: The Kindred telekinetically knocks someone away without harming them.
references: Clanbook: Brujah Revised Pg. 67

6.name: Crush
6.description: With a successful attack against an object, the Kindred automatically destroys it.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 235

6.name: Force
references: Faith and Fire Pg. 191
Laws of Elysium Pg. 69

7.name: Earthshock
7.description: The Kindred sends shockwaves through the Earth.
references: Guide to the Camarilla Pg. 93
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 193
Laws of the Night: Camarilla Guide Pg. 60

7.name: Fist of the Titans
7.description: The Kindred attacks or throws someone away telekinetically.
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 159

7.name: Immovable Object
7.description: Spend a Willpower point while standing on a solid surface to become absolutely immovable.
references: Lore of the Clans Pg. 124

7.name: The Forger's Hammer
7.description: The Kindred creates weapons that do extra damage.
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 88

7.name: Brutality
7.description: The Kindred is able to deal lethal damage with their unarmed strikes.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 235

7.name: Demolition
references: Laws of Elysium Pg. 69

8.name: Aftershock
8.description: Delay damage from attacks for up to 24 hours.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 235

8.name: Flick
8.description: The Kindred makes a simple motion that sends a target flying away.
references: Guide to the Camarilla Pg. 94
Laws of the Night: Camarilla Guide Pg. 60
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 193

8.name: Lend the Supernatural Vigor
8.description: The Kindred grants their incredible strength to another.
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 159

8.name: Touch of Pain
8.description: The Kindred puts the full force of their strength against one person or object.
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 89

9.name: Might of the Heroes
9.description: The Kindred performs physical feats of mythic proportion.
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 159

9.name: Destruction
references: Laws of the Night: Camarilla Guide Pg. 61

10.name: Plot Device
references: Gehenna Pg. 182
